archetype: Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury) mixed with Archetype 7 (Electric & Neon) accents

visual_enhancers.tracing_beam: use framer-motion to create shimmering border effect on key cards

final_cta_bg.description: Dark cinematic abstract background with neon green glow

navbar.elements: Logo on left, Links center, CTA 'Agendar Reunión' on right.

hero.layout: 2-column grid on desktop (text left, video right)
hero.video_integration: Video element rendered in a glassmorphic container with rounded corners and subtle green neon shadow. Auto-play, loop, muted.
hero.floating_elements: Framer motion animated small glass cards overlapping the video (WhatsApp notification, AI Chat Bubble, Analytics metric).
hero.ctas: Primary 'Agendar Reunión' (green bg, black text) -> Calendly. Secondary 'Ver Cómo Funciona' (outline white, glass).

problem_section.cards: Dark surface, border-white/10, red or muted icon to signify pain points. Hover border shifts to white/30.

services_section.style: Glassmorphism with hover green glow. Use Phosphor Icons. 2 or 3 column spans depending on the text length to create an irregular, artistic bento box.

how_it_works.layout: Vertical timeline or alternating zig-zag steps
how_it_works.style: Futuristic connecting lines (SVG dashed lines with moving gradient via Framer Motion). Numbered steps with green glowing circles.

automation_system.style: Central 'AI Engine' pulsing, connected via SVG glowing paths to outer nodes (WhatsApp, CRM, etc). Use lucide-react or phosphor icons.

results_section.style: Large green typography for numbers, animated via react-countup or framer-motion when scrolled into view.

psychology_section.layout: 5 elegant cards in a horizontal scrolling or masonry layout
psychology_section.style: Minimalist, 1px border, high contrast white text, deep black background.

testimonials.style: Elegant avatars: Circular div with glassmorphism, white text initials. 5 stars rating. High-end tone.

final_cta.layout: Full width, cinematic height (min-h-[60vh]), centered content.
final_cta.background: Use final_cta_bg image with absolute positioning and bg-black/60 overlay to ensure text readability.
final_cta.buttons: 'Agendar Reunión' (Calendly redirect) and 'Hablar por WhatsApp' (wa.me link).

whatsapp_floating.style: Fixed bottom right. Green glowing WhatsApp icon. Hover state expands to show 'Hablar con nosotros'.

animations.scroll: Use framer-motion whileInView for staggered fade-in up.
animations.cursor: Custom glowing cursor (div following mouse coords with mix-blend-mode and blur, tracking neon green).

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use 'framer-motion' for all scroll and floating animations.
Install and use 'lucide-react' or '@phosphor-icons/react' for icons.
Install and use 'react-tsparticles' for the hero background particles.
Implement the 'data-testid' attributes strictly on all interactive elements.
Do NOT use 'Inter' font. Use Google Fonts 'Cabinet Grotesk' (or similar like Space Grotesk/Outfit if unavailable via standard means, but prefer Cabinet Grotesk via import) and 'Manrope'.
Hero section MUST have the video clearly visible and auto-playing in a premium container on the right side.
For the Testimonials, use Initials (e.g., 'DR' for Doctor) in a sleek circle instead of placeholder photos.
Ensure the green color (#9EFF00) is used as an accent and CTA trigger, not as a large background block, to maintain the luxury feel.
All copy must be in Spanish as provided in the problem statement.
